positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a forest fox curled up with its bushy tail, rendered in thick, flowing black line work with negative space highlights. The fox is centered in a circular composition, sitting within a stylized wreath of fern leaves and abstract woodland elements. The color palette is limited to deep forest green, burnt orange, and creamy off-white. Strong silhouette, clean line art, tattoo flash style, highly detailed, vector quality, perfect for screen printing on apparel, 8k resolution, perfect symmetry, dramatic contrast, crisp lines.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, multiple figures, extra limbs, bad anatomy, jpeg artifacts, noise, grayscale, photographic
